welcome_message: CIDMATH Data Hub - new subject bundle (ADR 0027). Scaffolds a job-based raw+processed bundle wired to the run_build seam. You fill the TODO hooks; transform logic goes in src/cidmath_datahub/<subject>/.

subject_name.description: Subject area in snake_case (the schema + bundle name), e.g. wastewater

provider_code.description: Primary source provider code per ADR 0006 (e.g. cdc, noaa, census). If new, add it to ADR 0006's registry in the same PR.

primary_dataset.description: Dataset identifier in snake_case; the table name becomes <provider_code>_<primary_dataset> (e.g. nwss -> cdc_nwss)

update_semantics.description: Update semantics for the processed table (ADR 0007 controlled vocabulary)

success_message: Scaffolded bundles/{{.subject_name}}. Next: (1) implement the TODO hooks in bundles/{{.subject_name}}/src/build_{{.primary_dataset}}_*.py and the logic in src/cidmath_datahub/{{.subject_name}}/{{.primary_dataset}}.py; (2) copy .github/workflows/deploy-weather.yml to deploy-{{.subject_name}}.yml and swap the subject name; (3) run ruff + pytest. See docs/authoring-a-bundle.md. Deploy order: _platform -> _reference -> this bundle.
